query_name:
SELECT a.ca_state state,
       count(*) cnt
FROM 'customer_address.parquet' a ,
     'customer.parquet' c ,
     'store_sales.parquet' s ,
     'date_dim.parquet' d ,
     'item.parquet' i
WHERE a.ca_address_sk = c.c_current_addr_sk
  AND c.c_customer_sk = s.ss_customer_sk
  AND s.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
  AND s.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
  AND d.d_month_seq =
    (SELECT DISTINCT (d_month_seq)
     FROM 'date_dim.parquet' AS date_dim
     WHERE d_year = 2001
       AND d_moy = 1 )
  AND i.i_current_price > 1.2 *
    (SELECT avg(j.i_current_price)
     FROM 'item.parquet' j
     WHERE j.i_category = i.i_category)
GROUP BY a.ca_state
HAVING count(*) >= 10
ORDER BY cnt NULLS FIRST,
         a.ca_state NULLS FIRST
LIMIT 100;

extra_info.Conditions: i_category IS NOT DISTINCT FROM i_category

Projections: CASE  WHEN ((#1 > 1)) THEN ("error"('More than one row returned by a subquery used as an expression - scalar subqueries can only return a single row.
Use "SET scalar_subquery_error_on_multiple_rows=false" to revert to previous behavior of returning a random row.')) ELSE #0 END

extra_info.Conditions: i_category IS NOT DISTINCT FROM i_category
